person.name: Robert de Weyland
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
"Sir John, son of Sir Nicholas de Weyland, and Beatrice his wife, held these lordships in or about the 43rd of King Henry III., of Alan Burnet, a descendant of a Baronial family of that age, and by grant from the said Alan. By Mary his wife, he had issue two sons, Thomas and Nicholas ; and died seized of the manors, of Brandeston, Charsfield, and Westerfield.

Sir Thomas de Weyland, the eldest son and heir, succeeded to the said lordships ; and died seized thereof in or about 1290 ; leaving issue, by Margaret his wife, three sons ; William, John, and Richard; and in the 19th of King Edward II., a fine was levied between Master Robert de Baldock,* querent, and Sir William de Weyland, the eldest son, of this manor and Brandeston, granted to the said Robert ; who re-grants the same to Robert, son of the said Sir William de Weyland, and Cecilia his wife, daughter of Thos. de Baldock, and the heirs of their bodies, being a marriage settlement."

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Weyland於大約1300年出生在英國素福爾可貝利哈姆時，他的父親William de Weyland III35歲，母親Elizabeth de Rushton29歲。他與Cecily de Baldock結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1345年在英國素福爾可哈爾斯費爾德享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Weyland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt.

variants.name: Wieland
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Otto, Heinz, Dieter, Dietrich, Erdmann, Florian, Franz, Fritz, Gerhard.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wīg ‘war’ + land ‘land, territory’. This name was borne by the supernaturally skilled smith of ancient Germanic folk legend, and for this reason it may in part have been given as a nickname to blacksmiths.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): presumably an adoption of the German surname.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Weyland was born about 1300, in Baylham, Suffolk, England, his father, William de Weyland III, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth de Rushton, was 29. He married Cecily de Baldock. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1345, in Charsfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Weyland est né environ 1300, à Baylham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William de Weyland III, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Rushton, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Baldock. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1345, à Charsfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Weyland um 1300 in Baylham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Weyland III 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Rushton 29. Er hat Cecily de Baldock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1345 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Charsfield, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Weyland è nato il circa 1300 nel Baylham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William de Weyland III, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Rushton, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Cecily de Baldock. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1345, nel Charsfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Weylandが約1300年にイギリススフォルクバイルハムで生まれた時，父William de Weyland IIIは35歳，母Elizabeth de Rushtonは29歳であった。Cecily de Baldockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1345年にイギリススフォルクチャースフィールドで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Weyland(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 수폴크 베이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Weyland III(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Rushton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Cecily de Baldock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년 영국 수폴크 처스필드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Weyland nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Weyland III, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Rushton, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Baldock. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1345, em Charsfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Weyland родился около 1300 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Weyland III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Rushton, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Baldock. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1345 г. в местности чарсфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Weyland nació aproximadamente 1300, en Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Weyland III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Rushton, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Cecily de Baldock. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1345, en Charsfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
